titleStmt.title: SII 29.215: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 215. (A.R. No. 40 of 1961-62.) GAṄGĀPURAM, MAHABUBNAGAR TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in front of the Chennakēśva temple.

Top portion of the slab is broken and lost. This incomplete record contains eulogies of Govinda daṇḍādhipa and Dēva daṇḍadhipa. Seems to refer to a gift made to Paḍale and Bammayya by Dēvapaya daṇḍanāyaka and the seṭṭikāṟas.
It is in characters of the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vaṇnipudoḍamartthiya jaga ḷaṁ parasai dbha yaśōbhirāmana .
piriduṁ sadubhaktiyiṁ cakriya parakamaḷārādhanaṁgeyda
tammirpparuyatyutsāhadiṁdaṁ paḍedu nijaniyōgaṁgaḷaṁ mikka tējōtka
radiṁ gōviṁda daṁḍādhipa natuḷabaḷaṁ daṁḍādhipaṁ digvaramaṁ parvvalva
yaśōvallari pogaḷisidarttammanīdhātriyiṁdaṁ pogaḷalu takkatu
ti vōtadesaka śiṣṭa saṁdōhadiṁ kaimugisalutakkanu
cārada mahime bhayabhrāṁntiyaṁ vairigaḷu gāvagaviyalu takkai
deṁbaṁtu kalitanadudyōgaveṁdaḍe ninnaṁmige nannaṁ marttyanāvaṁ
bhuvanabhavanadoḍe dēva daṁḍādhināthā . pusiyillade nuḍilo
bada deseyilla dudāra dāha vāṁgaṇadoḷu saṁkisuvama dharmmanesa
dudō jagadoḷage dēvadaṁḍādhipana © Ajanenisidaṟivu garu
ḍhadhvaja nenisida lakṣmībhujagabhūṣaṇalakṣmabraja nenisidaḷavu ma
kara dhvaja nenisida mūrtti dēvadaṁḍādhipana . © ©
dalli paḍaleyaṁgaṁ bammeyaṁga dēvapaya daṁḍa
nāyakanuṁ seṭṭikāṟaruṁThe record seems to have ended here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 29.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
